en: Like I love country music
You gave me Oz, Willie, girl
ko: 너는 나에게 오즈와 윌리를 줬어, 소녀야

en: You gave me Garley Jones
You turned me on as much as I turn on my radio
ko: 너는 내가 라디오를 켤 때만큼 나를 설레게 해

en: Let's take our time, walk the line
Kinda like Johnny and June did
Yeah, let's do this
Baby, I love you
Like I love country music
Cause I could never live without you
ko: 너 없이는 절대 살 수 없어

en: All my favorite songs about you
ko: 너에 대한 내가 가장 좋아하는 노래들

en: Top to bottom, perfect you
Like Brooks and Dunn staved you out
You got me feeling like I'm a brand new man
ko: 너 덕분에 나는 새로운 남자가 된 기분이야
